page_content:
Prerequisite: DANC158.

Restriction: Must be in Dance program.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

DANC259 Jazz Il (2 Credits)

Continuation of the principles of Jazz |. Emphasis on style and execution of movement.

Prerequisite: DANC258.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

DANC269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
